response.response: Hello there! How can I help you today?
Good morning! How can I help you find the best deals today?
I'm Niyogen Assistant, your friendly supermarket guide! I'm here to help you find the best prices at Coles and Woolworths.
I can help you find the best prices on groceries at Coles and Woolworths!
I can help you find the best prices on groceries at Coles and Woolworths. Just tell me what you're looking for, and I'll compare prices for you!
You're welcome! Let me know if you need help finding the best prices at Coles or Woolworths.
I'm sorry, I don't have access to real-time weather information. You can check a weather app or website for the latest forecast.

Because they make up everything!
